title: Hybrid Brightness
description: Combines hardware brightness with software dimming for a seamless experience.

title: Go Darker
description: Reduce brightness below your monitor's minimum using intelligent overlay dimming.

title: Unified Control
description: One slider controls everything, from -100% to +100%, with control buttons.

title: Per-Monitor Control
description: Adjust the brightness of each connected display independently.

title: Native Performance
description: Built with native Windows technologies for a fast, lightweight, and responsive experience.

title: Always Ready
description: Lives quietly in your system tray, launches with Windows, and is always just one click away.
